title: levisticum aquilegiifolium
intro: Levisticum aquilegiifolium, also known as Sea orach, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Levisticum aquilegiifolium include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Sea orach can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
